# Combobox

A searchable dropdown component that combines a text input with a filterable list of options. Supports single and multiple selection, grouping, and custom empty states.

## Import

```jsx
import { Combobox } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

All sub-components are accessible as properties of the main `Combobox` component using dot notation:

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Combobox` | The root wrapper (renders `Combobox.Root`). Manages value and filtering state |
| `Combobox.Control` | Container for the input and trigger |
| `Combobox.Input` | The searchable text input |
| `Combobox.Trigger` | Button to toggle the dropdown open/closed |
| `Combobox.Content` | The dropdown content container |
| `Combobox.Positioner` | Positions the dropdown relative to the control |
| `Combobox.Item` | An individual selectable option |
| `Combobox.ItemText` | The text content of an option |
| `Combobox.ItemIndicator` | Check indicator for the selected option |
| `Combobox.ItemGroup` | A group of related options |
| `Combobox.ItemGroupLabel` | Label for an option group |
| `Combobox.Label` | Label for the combobox |
| `Combobox.ClearTrigger` | Button to clear the selected value(s) |
| `Combobox.Empty` | Content displayed when no options match the search |
| `Combobox.List` | Scrollable container for the options list |
| `Combobox.IndicatorGroup` | Container for grouping indicator icons in the control |
| `Combobox.Indicator` | Dropdown indicator icon (e.g., chevron) |

## Combobox (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `collection` | `ListCollection` | - | The collection of items (from Chakra `createListCollection`) |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string[], items: any[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the selection changes |
| `value` | `string[]` | - | Controlled selected value(s) |
| `defaultValue` | `string[]` | - | Initial selected value(s) for uncontrolled usage |
| `inputBehavior` | `"autohighlight" \| "autocomplete" \| "none"` | - | How the input interacts with the list |
| `selectionBehavior` | `"clear" \| "replace" \| "preserve"` | - | How the input behaves after selection |
| `multiple` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether multiple items can be selected |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the combobox is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
import { createListCollection } from "@chakra-ui/react";

const frameworks = createListCollection({
  items: [
    { label: "React", value: "react" },
    { label: "Vue", value: "vue" },
    { label: "Angular", value: "angular" },
    { label: "Svelte", value: "svelte" },
  ],
});

<Combobox collection={frameworks}>
  <Combobox.Label>Framework</Combobox.Label>
  <Combobox.Control>
    <Combobox.Input placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
    <Combobox.Trigger />
  </Combobox.Control>
  <Combobox.Positioner>
    <Combobox.Content>
      <Combobox.List>
        {frameworks.items.map((item) => (
          <Combobox.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
            <Combobox.ItemText>{item.label}</Combobox.ItemText>
            <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
          </Combobox.Item>
        ))}
      </Combobox.List>
      <Combobox.Empty>No results found</Combobox.Empty>
    </Combobox.Content>
  </Combobox.Positioner>
</Combobox>
```

### Multiple selection

```jsx
<Combobox collection={frameworks} multiple>
  <Combobox.Label>Technologies</Combobox.Label>
  <Combobox.Control>
    <Combobox.Input placeholder="Select technologies..." />
    <Combobox.Trigger />
    <Combobox.ClearTrigger />
  </Combobox.Control>
  <Combobox.Positioner>
    <Combobox.Content>
      <Combobox.List>
        {frameworks.items.map((item) => (
          <Combobox.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
            <Combobox.ItemText>{item.label}</Combobox.ItemText>
            <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
          </Combobox.Item>
        ))}
      </Combobox.List>
    </Combobox.Content>
  </Combobox.Positioner>
</Combobox>
```

### With indicator group

```jsx
<Combobox collection={frameworks}>
  <Combobox.Label>Framework</Combobox.Label>
  <Combobox.Control>
    <Combobox.Input placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
    <Combobox.IndicatorGroup>
      <Combobox.ClearTrigger />
      <Combobox.Indicator />
    </Combobox.IndicatorGroup>
  </Combobox.Control>
  <Combobox.Positioner>
    <Combobox.Content>
      <Combobox.List>
        {frameworks.items.map((item) => (
          <Combobox.Item key={item.value} item={item}>
            <Combobox.ItemText>{item.label}</Combobox.ItemText>
            <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
          </Combobox.Item>
        ))}
      </Combobox.List>
      <Combobox.Empty>No results found</Combobox.Empty>
    </Combobox.Content>
  </Combobox.Positioner>
</Combobox>
```

### With grouped items

```jsx
<Combobox collection={groupedItems}>
  <Combobox.Control>
    <Combobox.Input placeholder="Search..." />
    <Combobox.Trigger />
  </Combobox.Control>
  <Combobox.Positioner>
    <Combobox.Content>
      <Combobox.List>
        <Combobox.ItemGroup>
          <Combobox.ItemGroupLabel>Frontend</Combobox.ItemGroupLabel>
          <Combobox.Item item={react}>
            <Combobox.ItemText>React</Combobox.ItemText>
            <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
          </Combobox.Item>
        </Combobox.ItemGroup>
        <Combobox.ItemGroup>
          <Combobox.ItemGroupLabel>Backend</Combobox.ItemGroupLabel>
          <Combobox.Item item={node}>
            <Combobox.ItemText>Node.js</Combobox.ItemText>
            <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
          </Combobox.Item>
        </Combobox.ItemGroup>
      </Combobox.List>
    </Combobox.Content>
  </Combobox.Positioner>
</Combobox>
```

## Features

- Searchable dropdown with type-ahead filtering
- Supports single and multiple selection modes
- Grouped items with labels for organized option lists
- Empty state content when no results match
- Clear trigger to reset selection
- Built on Ark UI for accessible keyboard navigation
- Compound component pattern for fully customizable layouts
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
